title: Sundhari Kannal Lyrics Thalapathi
stanzas:
Sundhari Kannal Oru Seidhi Song Lyrics From Thalapathi
#Ilaiyaraja #SPB #SJanaki #Vaali

Sundhari Kannal Oru seidhi
solladi innaal nalla thaedhi
ennaye thandhaen unakkaaga
jenmame kondaen adharkkaaga

naan unai neenga maattaen
neenginaal thoonga maattaen
serndhadhe nam jeevane.

Sundhari Kannal Oru seidhi
solladi innaal nalla thaedhi
ennaye thandhaen unakkaaga
jenmame kondaen adharkkaaga

Vaai molindha
vaarthai yaavum
kaattril ponal niyaayamaa

paai virithu paavai
paartha kadhal
inbam maayamaa

vaal pudithu
nindraal kooda
nenjil undhan oorvalam

porkalathil saaindhaal
kooda jeevan unnai
saerndhidum

thaenilavu naal vaada
yaen indha sodhanai.
vaan nilavai nee kaelu
koorum en vedhanai

enaithaan
anbae marandhaayo
marappen
endre ninaithaayo

ennaye thandhaen unakkaaga
jenmame kondaen adharkkaaga
Sundhari Kannal Oru seidhi
solladi innaal nalla thaedhi

naan unai neenga maattaen
neenginaal thoonga maattaen
serndhadhe nam jeevane.

Sundhari Kannal Oru seidhi
solladi innaal nalla thaedhi
ennaye thandhaen unakkaaga
jenmame kondaen adharkkaaga

Solayilum mutkal thondrum
naanum neeyum neenginaal
paalaiyilum pookkal pookkum
naan un maarbil thoonginaal

maadhangalum vaaram aagum
naanum neeyum koodinaal
vaarangalum maadham aagum
padhai maari odinaal

kodi sugam vaaraadho
nee enai theendinaal
kaayangalum aaraadho
nee edhir thondrinaal

udane vandhaal uyir vazhum
varuven annaal varak koodum

Sundhari Kannal Oru seidhi
solladi innaal nalla thaedhi
ennaye thandhaen unakkaaga
jenmame kondaen adharkkaaga

naan unai neenga maattaen
neenginaal thoonga maattaen
serndhadhe nam jeevane.

Sundhari Kannal Oru seidhi
solladi innaal nalla thaedhi
ennaye thandhaen unakkaaga
jenmame kondaen adharkkaaga

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Sundhari Kannal'?

The song expresses deep love and longing, conveying emotions of devotion and connection between lovers.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Thalapathi'?

In Thalapathi, this song highlights the romantic relationship and emotional bond between the lead characters, enhancing the film's narrative.

Who are the singers and music director of 'Sundhari Kannal'?

The song features the legendary voices of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and S. Janaki, with music composed by Ilaiyaraaja.

When was 'Sundhari Kannal' released?

'Sundhari Kannal' was released on November 5, 1991.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Sundhari Kannal, the lyrical beauty and melodic richness create a captivating atmosphere of love and yearning. The song unfolds within the narrative of Thalapathi, where it serves as a poignant expression of the characters' emotions. With its soulful rendition by S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and S. Janaki, the song evokes nostalgia and warmth. It beautifully encapsulates the essence of romantic longing, making it a cherished classic in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Sundhari Kannal from Thalapathi is a timeless romantic melody that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of S. P. Balasubrahmanyam and S. Janaki, paired with Ilaiyaraaja's masterful composition, this song resonates deeply with listeners. Experience the magic of this classic that transcends generations and evokes heartfelt emotions.
stanzaMeanings: Don't say a message about beautiful eyes, I have received a good fortune for you, I was born for you.
I won't change for you, and you won't sleep because of me, our lives are intertwined.
Don't say a message about beautiful eyes, I have received a good fortune for you, I was born for you.
If words spoken from the mouth go into the air, is it fair?
Seeing a beautiful girl, love becomes a mirage.
If life is lost, your presence will still be in my heart.
If you enter the world, life will unite with you.
Why is this test on a day of sweetness? You listen to the sky and hear my pain.
Have you forgotten me, my love? Did you think I would forget?
Don't say a message about beautiful eyes, I have received a good fortune for you, I was born for you.
I won't change for you, and you won't sleep because of me, our lives are intertwined.
Don't say a message about beautiful eyes, I have received a good fortune for you, I was born for you.
Even in the words, if we are together, flowers will bloom in the garden of our dreams.
Months will become weeks when we are together, and paths will change when we run together.
Will happiness not come if you seek me? Will troubles not come if you approach me?
If you come suddenly, I will live, but if you don't come, I will perish.
Don't say a message about beautiful eyes, I have received a good fortune for you, I was born for you.
I won't change for you, and you won't sleep because of me, our lives are intertwined.
Don't say a message about beautiful eyes, I have received a good fortune for you, I was born for you.
